calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Christopher Swanson, Esq. 310-552-2250 Swanson Knight Law Group for Plaintiff.
Mehgan Gallagher, Esq. 424-297-3103 Theta Law Firm for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Ms. Gallagher contests and presents arguments; issue on privity, did not allege proper damages, no factual allegation on breach, didn's show Mercedes Benz acted negligently, vague, conclusory, insufficient.
The Court comments and poses questions.
Mr. Swanson responds; agrees with the scope of the JOP, argument exceeded, agrees with TR

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant's motion for judgment on the pleadings.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Defendant's motion for judgment on the pleadings is off calendar. "Before filing a motion for judgment on the pleadings pursuant to this chapter, the moving party shall meet and confer in person, by telephone, or by video conference." (CCP 439(a).) The moving party is also obliged to file a declaration setting forth the "means by which the moving party met and conferred." (CCP 439(a)(3)(A).) The moving party's declaration does not describe the means by which the parties met and conferred. (Gallagher Decl., par. 2 ["I attempted to communicate with Plaintiff's counsel regarding the deficiencies in the Complaint but the parties were unable to reach a resolution."]. Moreover, the record discloses that no meet and confer actually occurred. (Cohen Decl., pars. 3-5.)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
